name: property-value-less-than-loan-amount
rationale: Broker correction asserts property_value $400,000 and loan_amount $475,000 — sanity violation: requested loan exceeds property value (>100% LTV). F1.PV canonical-map accepts the value but F2.DH discrepancyHold should activate via sanity-violation check (Vienna shouldn't underwrite >100% LTV). Layer 3 product-design item: decline outright vs escalate vs flag-for-admin-review.
notes: Two-event sequence. Layer 3 #19 product-design item; PV<LA represents an impossible-to-underwrite shape.
